description: Routing variant: balanced (as_of 2026-07-12). Default. Opus 4.8 judgment on plan/minimality, Sonnet 5 implementation, GPT-5.6 Sol cross-family review via Codex. Anthropic + OpenAI only, two hosts. Paste over the model_routing section of quality-loop.config.json, then run setup-models and check-config.

strong_reasoning.note: Reviewer leg. Reviews stay advisory beneath deterministic gates; verify findings locally.

main_session.note: Implementer runs in the Claude Code main session on Sonnet 5.
